description_long: This sculpture consists of a tall, weathered wooden post with a partially embedded, sculpted human face on one side. The face appears to be emerging from the wood, with detailed features and a serene expression. Cascading from above the face is a strand of artificial or preserved green foliage, adding a naturalistic element to the piece. The wood is aged and textured, with visible grain and knots, and the face is rendered in a material that contrasts slightly in color and finish. The back and sides of the post are plain, emphasizing the dramatic reveal of the face and foliage on the front. The overall effect is both rustic and contemplative, blending organic and human-made forms.
description: A tall, weathered wooden post with a sculpted human face partially emerging from one side, adorned with cascading green foliage. The piece combines rustic wood textures with lifelike facial detail and natural elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the weathered wood and a partial glimpse of the embedded face and foliage.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain, textured wood surface with minimal detail and the foliage barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the wood grain and a clearer look at the cascading foliage, with the face partially visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view featuring the sculpted human face, detailed features, and the full cascade of green foliage.
attribute_subject_matter: human face emerging from wood with foliage
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be suited for outdoor urban or park environments.
